Expertise

What I Bring to Every Campaign

A complete, profit-first approach to Meta Ads — from audience research and creative strategy to scaling and conversion optimisation.

🎯
Meta Ads Strategy
Full-funnel campaign architecture on Facebook and Instagram, built around your profit margins, not vanity metrics. Every decision is driven by real conversion data.
📋
Lead Generation
Website lead form and WhatsApp campaigns delivering high-intent leads at ₹79–₹92 CPL — consistently below industry benchmarks in education and EdTech.
🔄
Conversion Optimisation
Turning leads into paying customers through smart retargeting, audience refinement, and collaboration with your sales team to maximise admission and enrollment rates.
🎨
Creative Strategy
Career-focused, audience-specific ad creatives and copy that stop the scroll and build genuine intent. Every creative is tested and improved using real performance data.
📈
Campaign Scaling
Scaling budgets intelligently only after validating real conversions — protecting your cost per acquisition while growing revenue, with no wasted spend.
📱
Social Media Management
Growing brand presence organically on Facebook and Instagram through consistent content, engagement strategy, and data-led tracking. 1.5M+ Instagram views for Arrow Thought.
Let’s Work Together
